metadata.description: RunDrill course plugins. Each plugin is one course: a <subject>-coach skill backed by an MCP drill engine (curriculum, progress, mistake memory).

plugins.name: rundrill-kazakh
plugins.description: Kazakh coach — drills, progress, and mistake memory. Starts at A0 (the alphabet).

plugins.name: rundrill-english
plugins.description: English coach — drills, progress, and mistake memory, for Russian/Kazakh speakers.

plugins.name: rundrill-python
plugins.description: Python coach — learn to read and review code (incl. AI-generated) with drills, progress, and mistake memory, plus optional hands-on exercises.

plugins.name: rundrill-rust
plugins.description: Rust coach — get over the ownership wall by reading, tracing, and reviewing code (incl. AI-generated), with the compiler as teacher.

plugins.name: rundrill-sql
plugins.description: SQL coach — learn to think in sets and read & review queries (incl. AI-generated), with the query planner as teacher, from SQLite to PostgreSQL.

plugins.name: rundrill-excel
plugins.description: Excel coach — learn the spreadsheet by reading, predicting, and reviewing formulas (incl. AI-generated), self-scored against a rubric; core grid to Power Query, modeling, automation, and dashboards.

plugins.name: rundrill-babok-prep
plugins.description: Business-analysis coach (BABOK / IIBA) — prep ECBA, CCBA, and CBAP by judging exam scenarios and reviewing real BA artifacts (find the planted defect), with mock-elicitation role-plays and timed mock exams.

plugins.name: rundrill-system-design
plugins.description: System-design coach — design distributed systems & prep the FAANG system design interview by reviewing flawed designs (find the planted SPOF/hotspot/wrong tradeoff), defending tradeoffs, estimating capacity, and running mock interviews.

plugins.name: rundrill-aws
plugins.description: AWS cloud-certification coach — prep the whole ladder (Cloud Practitioner → Solutions Architect/Developer/SysOps/Data/ML → DevOps Pro → Security & Networking specialties) by choosing the best service under constraints, reviewing real configs for the planted flaw (over-broad IAM, SPOF, insecure default), and sitting timed mock exams.

plugins.name: rundrill-soft-skills
plugins.description: Soft-skills coach for engineers — get better at the communication that decides careers: asking questions, giving and taking feedback, negotiating scope and estimates, async and cross-cultural writing, influence without authority, and leading. You practise by reviewing flawed messages (find the buried answer, the cross-cultural misfire, the date-as-promise) and role-playing the hard conversation — the coach never writes it for you.

plugins.name: rundrill-secure-coding
plugins.description: Secure-coding coach (OWASP OCSD / ASVS) — learn to find, exploit, and fix the vulnerabilities that ship in real code: injection, XSS, broken auth and access control, weak crypto, SSRF, deserialization, supply-chain and AI risks. The signature drill hands you plausible AI-written code with a planted vulnerability to find, name, and fix (like a security PR review), plus exploit-then-fix in your own lab, STRIDE threat models, and ASVS checklists — the coach never writes the fix for you.

plugins.name: rundrill-pmp-prep
plugins.description: PMP exam-prep coach for PMI's 2026 exam (Foundations → People → Process → Business Environment) — learn the situational judgment the exam really tests: what the project manager should do FIRST, where the PMI mindset (servant leadership, collaborate before you escalate, root cause first) beats the forceful real-world reflex. The signature drill hands you a confident project decision an AI drafted and asks you to find the planted trap (jumps to authority, taps the wrong reserve, calls gold plating a change), plus the EVM/PERT/critical-path math, classification and approach-selection, and timed domain-weighted mock exams — the coach never makes the call for you.
